summary: Iteration 20: Frontend-only testing of Discovery page UI redesign. All 8 requested features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Discovery tab loads with 3-column layout on desktop (found 8 lg:grid-cols-3 elements)
Yes/No questions use toggle switches instead of buttons (found 32 switch components)
Note icons are present and clickable (found 66 toggle-note-* buttons)
Clicking note icon expands inline note field under the question (yellow bg-yellow-50 box)
Conditional questions appear indented with blue styling when parent is Yes (border-l-2 border-blue-400)
Conditional questions show '↳ If Yes:' label in blue text
Section toggles work (On/Off) with confirmation dialog for disabling (found 9 section containers)
Dropdowns and number inputs still work (IP Addr Multiplier, # of Data Centers, etc.)
Middle column has subtle gray background shading (found 12 bg-muted/30 elements)
critical_code_review_comments: AssessmentQuestions.jsx correctly implements compact mode with 3-column grid (lg:grid-cols-3)
Yes/No questions use Switch component in compact mode instead of Button pairs
Inline notes use bg-yellow-50 styling and expand directly under each question
Conditional questions use border-l-2 border-blue-400 bg-blue-50/50 for visual distinction
Middle column shading uses bg-muted/30 class for subtle gray background
Note icons use MessageSquare icon with blue highlight when note exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Discovery page UI redesign verified: 1) 3-column layout using lg:grid-cols-3 for short questions. 2) Toggle switches (Switch component) for Yes/No questions in compact mode. 3) Note icons (MessageSquare) expand inline yellow note boxes. 4) Conditional questions show with blue left border and '↳ If Yes:' label. 5) Middle column has bg-muted/30 shading. 6) Section toggles show On/Off state with confirmation dialog.

3_column_layout.implementation: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 in compact mode

toggle_switches_for_yesno.implementation: Switch component used in compact mode for yesno fieldType

note_icons_clickable.details: Found 66 note toggle buttons, blue highlight when note exists

inline_notes_expand.details: Note input expands directly under question when icon clicked

conditional_questions_blue_styling.details: Shows '↳ If Yes:' label in blue text, indented under parent question

section_toggles.details: Found 9 section containers with On/Off toggles, confirmation dialog on disable

dropdowns_and_inputs.implementation: Select and Input components with appropriate data-testids
dropdowns_and_inputs.details: IP Addr Multiplier dropdown, number inputs for Data Centers, Sites, etc.

middle_column_shading.implementation: bg-muted/30 class applied to middle column (colIndex === 1)
